title: Figma File
description: A Figma design file containing a document tree with pages, frames, components, styles, and version metadata. This schema represents the response from the GET /v1/files/{file_key} endpoint.

name.description: The name of the file as it appears in the Figma editor and file browser.

role.description: The role of the user making the API request in relation to the file.

lastModified.description: The UTC ISO 8601 time at which the file was last modified.

editorType.description: The type of editor associated with this file. Figma is for design files, FigJam is for whiteboarding.

thumbnailUrl.description: A URL to a thumbnail image of the file. The URL expires after a period of time.

version.description: The current version number of the file. This changes on every save.

components.description: A mapping from component IDs to component metadata for all components in the file.

componentSets.description: A mapping from component set IDs to component set metadata.

schemaVersion.description: The version of the Figma file schema that this file uses.

styles.description: A mapping from style IDs to style metadata for all styles in the file.

mainFileKey.description: The key of the main file. Present only when this file is a branch.

branches.description: A list of branches for this file. Only present if branch_data was requested.

DocumentNode.description: The root node of the Figma document tree. Contains one or more canvas (page) nodes.

id.description: A string uniquely identifying this node within the document. The document root is always '0:0'.

name.description: The name given to the node by the user in the tool.

type.description: The type of the node. Always DOCUMENT for the root node.

children.description: An array of canvas (page) nodes attached to the document.

CanvasNode.description: A canvas represents a page in the Figma file. Each canvas contains layers of design elements.

id.description: A string uniquely identifying this node within the document.

name.description: The name of the page as displayed in the layers panel.

type.description: The type of the node. Always CANVAS for page nodes.

children.description: An array of top-level layers on the canvas.

prototypeStartNodeID.description: The ID of the node that is the starting point for prototyping on this page.

flowStartingPoints.description: An array of flow starting points for prototyping.

Node.description: A generic node in the Figma document tree. Nodes have different types such as FRAME, GROUP, TEXT, RECTANGLE, VECTOR, COMPONENT, INSTANCE, and others.

id.description: A string uniquely identifying this node within the document.

name.description: The name given to the node by the user in the tool.

visible.description: Whether the node is visible on the canvas. Defaults to true.

locked.description: Whether the node is locked, preventing it from being selected and modified.

children.description: An array of child nodes, present for node types that can contain children.

fills.description: An array of fill paints applied to the node.

strokes.description: An array of stroke paints applied to the node.

strokeWeight.description: The weight of strokes on the node.

opacity.description: Opacity of the node, from 0 to 1.

effects.description: An array of effects attached to this node.

componentId.description: For INSTANCE nodes, the ID of the component that this instance refers to.

characters.description: For TEXT nodes, the raw characters in the text node.

Color.description: An RGBA color value with all channels ranging from 0 to 1.

Rectangle.description: A bounding rectangle defined by its position and size.

x.description: X coordinate of the top left corner.

y.description: Y coordinate of the top left corner.

Paint.description: A paint applied as a fill or stroke. Can be a solid color, gradient, or image.

opacity.description: Overall opacity of the paint, from 0 to 1.

blendMode.description: How this paint blends with the paints below it.

imageRef.description: For IMAGE paints, a reference to the image content.

scaleMode.description: For IMAGE paints, how the image is scaled within the node.

Effect.description: A visual effect applied to a node such as a shadow or blur.

radius.description: Radius of the effect (blur radius for blur effects, shadow spread).

Component.description: Metadata about a main component within the file.

key.description: The globally unique key of the component.

description.description: The description of the component as entered in the editor.

componentSetId.description: The ID of the component set this component belongs to, if any.

documentationLinks.description: An array of documentation links attached to this component.

uri.description: The URI of the documentation link.

remote.description: Whether this component is a remote component from an external library.

ComponentSet.description: Metadata about a component set, which groups variants of a component together.

key.description: The globally unique key of the component set.

description.description: The description of the component set.

remote.description: Whether this component set is from a remote library.

Style.description: Metadata about a style that can be applied to nodes.

key.description: The globally unique key of the style.

remote.description: Whether this style is from a remote library.

Branch.description: Information about a branch of a Figma file.

key.description: The key of the branch file.

thumbnailUrl.description: A URL to a thumbnail image of the branch.

lastModified.description: The UTC ISO 8601 time at which the branch was last modified.

id.description: Unique stable ID of the user.

imgUrl.description: URL to the user's profile image.

email.description: Email address associated with the user's account.

Version.description: A recorded version entry in the file's version history.

createdAt.description: The UTC ISO 8601 time at which the version was created.

label.description: The label given to the version in the editor.

Comment.description: A comment or reply left by a user on a Figma file.

fileKey.description: The key of the file the comment belongs to.

parentId.description: If present, the ID of the comment to which this is a reply.

createdAt.description: The UTC ISO 8601 time at which the comment was left.

resolvedAt.description: If set, the UTC ISO 8601 time the comment was resolved.

orderId.description: The number displayed with the comment in the UI.

reactions.description: An array of emoji reactions to the comment.

Reaction.description: An emoji reaction left on a comment.

emoji.description: The emoji used for the reaction.

createdAt.description: The UTC ISO 8601 time at which the reaction was left.
